mapper.select:
SELECT ID, PROVINCE_CODE, CITY_CODE, AREA_CODE, NAME, CODE, REC_NAM, REC_TIM, UPD_NAM, UPD_TIM, IDEV_VERSIONUSE, OBJ, MAP, IS_CK FROM M_CITY
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_CITY( ID, PROVINCE_CODE, CITY_CODE, AREA_CODE, NAME, CODE, REC_NAM, REC_TIM, UPD_NAM, UPD_TIM, IDEV_VERSIONUSE, OBJ, MAP, IS_CK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_NAME, CREATE_TIME )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{provinceCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cityCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{areaCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{code, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{recNam, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{recTim, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updNam, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updTim, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{idevVersionuse, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{obj, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{map, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isCk, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE M_CITY SET ID = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PROVINCE_CODE = #{provinceCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CITY_CODE = #{cityCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, AREA_CODE = #{areaCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NAME = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CODE = #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REC_NAM = #{recNam,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REC_TIM = #{recTim,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPD_NAM = #{updNam,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPD_TIM = #{updTim,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IDEV_VERSIONUSE = #{idevVersionuse,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OBJ = #{obj,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MAP = #{map,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_CK = #{isCk,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
